nasb.text: and he took six hundred select chariots, and all the other chariots of Egypt with officers over all of them.

esv.text: and took six hundred chosen chariots and all the other chariots of Egypt with officers over all of them.

cnv.text: 並且帶著六百輛特選的馬車和埃及所有的馬車，每輛馬車上都有馬車長。

ccb.text: 率领埃及所有的战车，包括六百辆最精锐的战车，每辆车上都有战车长。
